series_metadata.series_title: Structural Steel Structural Member Acceptance Forms
series_metadata.series_description: This includes supporting information including company and project correspondence, company, fabricator questionnaire & initial plant inspection, rating form letters and non conformance items, personnel qualifications, welding procedures and Proedure Qualification Reports, plant Quality Assurance inspection reports, inspector worksheets, shop drawings, fabricator rating, payweights, Non-destructive Testing reports, and welding procedures. TE FORMS are used to sample identification when submitted to the lab for testing. [i.e. information from the TE form is transferred to CMS then CMS creates a Sample ID number which can be used to track the sampling process from start to finish].

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper scanned ; Electronic: electronically scanned records as long as products are in use by ODOT
